review_title: Outstanding SEO and GEO platform to create and optimize content
description: It is a valuable SEO and GEO tool that we anticipate using extensively in the foreseeable future for all content-related projects.
author: Jean-Philippe M.
pros: An intuitive platform offering excellent SEO and GEO recommendations to optimize your online presence.
cons: They are still working on the additional reporting features we requested, and progress continues on their end.
author_profession: Growth Marketing Manage - SEO, Content and Brand

review_title: I recommend Semji for SEO cotent that performs
description: I'm very happy to work with the platform and the team for two years now. We can improve more easily and faster our content, we can use AI smartly to improve our existing content.
author: Thibaud V.
pros: What I like using Semji is the way you can optimise and create powerful seo content with AI. You get a content score that is easy to understand and the planification tool helps you to track the evolution of the piece of content you just created. Using Semji you can also create AI generated content using data from your brand guidelines in terms of tone of voice for instance. This makes it more tailored to your actual needs. Plus, the platform evolves quite often and the team is super nice.
cons: For me there's a lack of data about the competition on the SERP. I would like to know what their content score is in order to know how my content performs compared to them.

review_title: Great tool to optimize your copy!
author: Emily R.
pros: - it helps you with generating ideas through the AI option - shows exactly how to optimize your content - great help from semji with setting up the tool
cons: - not self explanatory - using the AI features costs you points - no good grammar/spelling check feature
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

review_title: Game-Changer for SEO and Content Optimization!
description: My experience with Semji has been outstanding! This tool has completely transformed the way I approach SEO and content optimization. The AI-powered insights, smart recommendations, and real-time content scoring system make it incredibly efficient and user-friendly. It not only helps improve rankings but also streamlines the writing process, saving time while ensuring top-quality content. Whether you're an SEO expert or a content marketer, Semji is an invaluable asset. Highly recommended!
author: Clémence G.
pros: Semji is an outstanding SEO tool that significantly boosts content performance. Its AI-driven recommendations, keyword insights, and content score system make it incredibly easy to optimize articles efficiently. The platform provides clear, actionable guidance, helping create high-quality, search-engine-friendly content. The intuitive interface and real-time suggestions save time while improving ranking potential. A must-have for any content marketer or SEO professional!
cons: Honestly, nothing! Semji delivers exactly what it promises—powerful SEO optimization with smart recommendations and an intuitive interface. It’s a game-changer for content creation.

review_title: Great experience with SEMJI
author: Laurie G.
pros: The tool is great and easy to use to optimize content and see how to overcome competition on Google. The recommandations are always very helpful and simple. Finally my collaboration with [sensitive content hidden] with a great professional, available and competent.
cons: I would say because we are an ONG, the price of the licence can be a little too much to handle. Having a NGO discount like other digital tools would be great.

review_title: A powerful and constantly evolving SEO writing tool!
description: I've been using Semji for several months now, and it’s genuinely impressive! It’s become an essential part of my content creation workflow, helping me quickly create high-quality, SEO-optimized articles. One thing I particularly appreciate is how the Semji team frequently updates the platform, continually adapting features based on user feedback and needs. It truly feels like they’re listening to their users. Highly recommended!
author: Julien C.
pros: Easy to use and highly effective for SEO writing Regular updates reflecting user feedback Great user support
cons: Nothing significant; the team quickly addresses minor issues

review_title: A Powerful SEO Tool with Room for Improvement
author: Jeanne G.
pros: Semji is an excellent collaborative tool that is easy to use and significantly boosts SEO efficiency. Its intuitive interface allows teams to work seamlessly on content optimization, saving time and streamlining workflows. Over the past year, we've optimized around 300 pieces of content using Semji and have seen substantial improvements in our SEO performance, with over 450K clicks and 40M impressions generated. The platform's data-driven recommendations and content scoring system help ensure that our efforts translate into tangible results. Additionally, the Customer Success Managers (CSMs) are outstanding—always available, proactive, and providing valuable insights to maximize the tool’s potential.
cons: Despite its strengths, Semji has some limitations. The number of user seats is restricted, which can be a challenge for larger teams. Additionally, while the AI-powered features and ongoing developments are promising, they are not yet fully optimized. We expect these functionalities to improve in the coming months, making the platform even more effective.
author_profession: SEO for Digital Communication and Branding

review_title: Performing SEO/Copywriting tool
description: The tool is complete in terms of copywriting. Whether you want to optimise an existing article or create a new one. The tracking of keyword positioning is very interesting, as is the evolution of the content score.
author: Julie M.
pros: The tool allows you to write with SEO recommendations to meet the needs of web users
cons: Text's extractor by page to configure before use

review_title: The best AI tool on the market
description: Semji is a great tool! I've been using it for two years now, and it has truly revolutionized my ability to create relevant SEO content. I spend half the time creating my content, and it's much more effective. My site is now really well-ranked on Google. The teams are very present on a daily basis and really efficient in helping us with any request. I highly recommend Semji 100%, it's a great investment!
author: Oriane M.
pros: The efficiency of AI and the time savings it allows.
cons: Nothing specially, I am really satisfied with the platform

review_title: Thanks Semji
description: Semji is a powerful tool that we use on a daily basis, and which allows us to effectively optimize our site and our blog
author: Raphaël A.
pros: I really appreciate the fact that Semji evolves all the time
cons: The tool is sometimes a little slow to charge

review_title: Très bon outil seo
author: Alexandre P.
pros: Semji me permet de gagner beaucoup temps dans l'analyse de la serp ainsi que dans la structuration du contenu.
cons: Semji avait tendance à utiliser des termes dont je ne voulais pas mais maintenant avec la nouvelle fonctionnalité c'est fini

review_title: Plateforme SEO efficace, portée par des experts.
description: L’accompagnement par des experts est un véritable atout : leurs conseils sont précis, pertinents et adaptés aux enjeux de chaque projet, témoignant d’un grand professionnalisme.
author: Claudine J.
pros: Semji est une plateforme performante et intuitive qui facilite grandement l’optimisation SEO des contenus.
cons: Seul petit bémol : pour les marchés très nichés, certaines recommandations peuvent manquer de finesse ou nécessiter un ajustement manuel plus poussé. Cela reste néanmoins une solution puissante pour améliorer la visibilité et la performance des contenus en ligne.

review_title: Un outil qui nous a déjà prouvé son efficacement en seulement 6 mois d'utilisation
description: Excellent outil, excellent suivi. En adoptant Semji vous adoptez une solution et un accompagnement pour être surs d'optimiser votre utilisation et de voir des résultats concrets
author: Cheyenne L.
pros: La simplicité d'utilisation et le suivi personnalisé
cons: Quelque fois les propositions sont en anglais pour du contenu français, mais c'est normal compte tenu que nous sommes au Québec

review_title: A fast-growing SEO tool
description: I've only been using Semji for a short time, but I've found it to be a real time-saver and a collaborative tool. It's easy to follow the progress of our projects. It's just a matter of setting up the tool to suit your needs, to get the most out of it.
author: Pauline C.
pros: The tool is very intuitive and is great for project follow-up. Using AI is a real time-saver
cons: We need to track the use of credits... Each action corresponds to a number of credits. I found it frustrating to have to think about this.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

review_title: A powerful tool for SEO
description: Our overall experience has been positive: it's user-friendly, has boosted our SEO, and updated all our current content.
author: Magdalena M.
pros: Highly intuitive, user-friendly, and ideal for batch content creation! It has significantly boosted SEO and become a leading channel for traffic acquisition
cons: AI is helpful, but it's essential to proofread before posting.

review_title: Innovative and fun like a game
description: it's intuitive and innovative. It's great for seeing all our pages in one place and tracking their results. The functions are really useful, especially for customising content. It's easier to improve our pages for better positioning on Google.
author: Laurence C.
pros: a powerful platform that offers multiple choices and makes it easy to write content
cons: I don't know yet, I don't have enough experience.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

review_title: An essential SEO content tool !
author: Anju B.
pros: SEMJI is an intuitive and effective SEO platform that has transformed our approach to SEO content. Its in-depth content analyses provide precise and relevant recommendations, significantly improving our keyword rankings. The AI feature is especially useful for writing new content. SEMJI automates many tasks, boosting our team productivity. An essential tool for all SEOs
cons: Can't wait to use the perfect version of the AI brand voice feature !

review_title: Un super outil
description: Le SAV est super réactif et la plateforme en elle-même agréable à utiliser. Pour des débutants comme des confirmés en la matière Semji est un très bon outil. L'intégration de l'IA est intéressante même si elle appelle encore quelques perfectionnements.
author: Maylis P.
pros: L'accompagnement dans l'optimisation des contenus SEO sur de la création ou de la mise à jour est très intuitif et facile à prendre en main.
cons: Une analyse sur la fréquence d'utilisation du mot clé manque pour un accompagnement absolument complet. Une personnalisation des concurrents remontés serait aussi un vrai plus comparé à l'existant.

review_title: Une plateforme FRANÇAISE très qualitative
description: Cela fait un an que nous utilisons Semji et nous en sommes très contents. La plateforme est simple, efficace et l'intégration de l'IA est vraiment au top. Une mention spéciale pour [caché sensible contenu] qui suit notre projet d'une très belle manière avec des points réguliers. Les résultats sont là et le SEO est boosté, mais il faut garder en tête qu'il est nécessaire d'y allouer du temps. C'est ce qui fait la différence pour que les stats s'envolent. C'est un outil que nous recommandons vivement !
author: 💬 Dorian M.
pros: La simplicité et l'efficacité : La plateforme est très intuitive à prendre en main. L'IA intégrée : Elle est vraiment très bien et facilite grandement la rédaction. L'accompagnement humain : Suivi et points réguliers qui nous aident beaucoup. Les performances : Les résultats sont là, nous constatons un vrai boost de notre SEO.
cons: L'exigence en temps : Ce n'est pas un défaut de l'outil, mais il faut savoir qu'il ne fait pas tout tout seul. Pour que les statistiques s'envolent vraiment, il est indispensable d'y allouer du temps humain régulièrement. Sans cet investissement de notre part, les résultats seraient moins probants.

review_title: Un outil performant et en constante évolution
description: Mon expérience avec Semji est très positive. L’outil se démarque par sa capacité à évoluer en fonction des besoins de ses utilisateurs, offrant des fonctionnalités toujours plus pertinentes pour l’optimisation de contenu. Le suivi et l’accompagnement sont également excellents, garantissant une prise en main efficace et un réel gain de productivité.
author: Elsa C.
pros: J’apprécie particulièrement la qualité de l’outil et son évolution continue pour s’adapter aux besoins des utilisateurs. Le suivi est également un vrai point fort, garantissant une expérience fluide et efficace.
cons: Rien de notable à améliorer, l’outil répond bien aux attentes.

review_title: Very good experience with Semji
author: Flore D.
pros: Semji is a very practical tool for organizing content. Writers can easily understand how to optimize their text, and the scoring system even makes it fun while allowing editorial freedom.
cons: I really like this tool, however the company must be willing to invest in an SEO strategy because it requires a budget like all other tools of this level of expertise

review_title: Efficient and Smart Content Optimization with Semji
description: My overall experience with Semji was very positive, as it enhanced content quality and SEO performance with AI-driven insights. I particularly appreciated its data-driven recommendations, intuitive interface, and ability to streamline content production while improving search rankings.
author: Calypso F.
pros: I really liked Semji's ability to optimize content efficiently with AI-driven insights. Its intuitive interface and real-time recommendations make content creation much more strategic and impactful.
cons: I found that Semji's learning curve can be a bit steep for beginners. Additionally, some advanced features could be more customizable to better fit specific content needs.

review_title: One of the best SEO tools in the world!
author: Louis D.
pros: I've been using Semji for 1 year now, and it's clearly the best investment you can make in SEO these days. A complete tool, a more than impressive AI, and results that live up to my expectations. A real gem. Go for it!
cons: Nothing to report so far, everything's perfect!

review_title: Guided Content Optimization but High AI Credit Consumption
author: Élisabeth M.
pros: What I appreciate most about Semji are the recommendations provided. They offer clear guidance in content optimization, making the process much more straightforward and enhancing writing efficiency.
cons: One downside is that using the AI requires a lot of credits. This can limit its usage and demands careful management of the available resources.

review_title: Semji saves me time
description: The overall experience is good, I recommend it for web editors.
author: Manon J.
pros: Semji saves me a lot of time on a daily basis, it's very practical.
cons: The AI regularly encounters bugs, so it uses credits when it shouldn't.
